title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? CGI India Capital India in Pune offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CGI India Capital India:
CGI India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India Capital India!
